name: Oatmeal Fudge Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a jelly roll pan, measuring 15" x 10.5" x 1".
3. In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar and margarine (or butter), then add eggs and vanilla.
4. Stir in the Bisquick baking mix and oats until fully combined.
5. In a saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate chips with sweetened condensed milk, margarine (or butter), and salt, stirring constantly until smooth.
6. Mix in chopped nuts and additional vanilla.
7. Press about two-thirds of the oatmeal mixture onto the prepared pan using greased hands.
8. Spread the chocolate mixture evenly over the oatmeal layer.
9. Drop remaining oatmeal mixture by tablespoonsful onto the top.
10. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Cut into bars, approximately 2" x 1".
Makes 70 bars.
